reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Passed all 6 gates. Code verification confirmed: data_column_verification.rs:688, blob_verification.rs:536, and block_verification.rs:991 all call get_beacon_proposer_indices(epoch) which always recomputes from active validators (beacon_state.rs:1166-1175), instead of reading from state.proposer_lookahead as required by EIP-7917. A compliant implementation exists at beacon_state.rs:1144-1153 (get_beacon_proposer_index singular) which reads from the cache post-Fulu, but gossip verification paths don't use it. The spec violation is clear and could cause consensus splits if different clients or code paths produce different results, but no concrete attack path to trigger divergence was found. All three paths operate on current epoch after cheap_state_advance, so they could use the cached singular function. Spec reference from outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W0B1_1771748647.json: 'get_beacon_proposer_index must return proposer_lookahead[slot % SLOTS_PER_EPOCH], not recompute.' Severity justified as High per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json threshold: network splits affecting >33% if cache-vs-recompute divergence occurs across implementations.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: get_beacon_proposer_index must return proposer_lookahead[slot % SLOTS_PER_EPOCH], not recompute. (forall slot s: get_beacon_proposer_index(state,s)==state.proposer_lookahead[s%SLOTS_PER_EPOCH])
